name: The Crew Motorfest
short_description: Welcome to Motorfest, the ultimate open-world driving experience. Explore the Hawaiian islands of O'ahu and Maui. Celebrate the best of car culture through 20+ themed campaigns (street racing, offroad, drift...) and collect hundreds of iconic vehicles. Enjoy the game free for five hours!
detailed_description:
Season 3 Roadmap


Comparison Grid


The Crew Motorfest Ultimate Year 3 Edition

Ultimate Year 3 Edition includes:

-Year 3 Pass*, featuring 20 additional vehicles + 1 bonus vehicle.

-Year 2 Pass, featuring up to 20 additional vehicles and the Chase Squad experience.

-Year 1 Pass, with 25 additional vehicles.

-Fitted Ultimate Pack, including 2 vehicles: Porsche 718 Spyder 2021 Fitted Edition and Honda Civic Type R 2021 Fitted Edition.


The Crew Motorfest | Year 3 Pass

Expand your Motorfest experience with up to 21 vehicles to add to your collection! The Year 3 Pass includes:

- A total of 20 new vehicles via monthly drops, including 2 exclusive vehicles on Day 1: the Ferrari 12Cilindri (2025) and Zenvo Aurora Agil (2026).

- 1 bonus vehicle exclusively for Year 1 Pass or Year 2 Pass owners: the majestic Cadillac Ciel concept.

Get ready for the most varied selection of vehicles ever seen in a Year Pass: hypercars, racing legends, remote-controlled cars, there is something for everyone in the Year 3 Pass!


The Crew Motorfest Ultimate Year 2 Edition

Ultimate Year 2 Edition includes:

- Year 2 Pass, featuring up to 20 additional vehicles and the Chase Squad experience.

- Year 1 Pass, with 25 additional vehicles.

- Fitted Ultimate Pack, including 2 vehicles: Porsche 718 Spyder 2021 Fitted Edition and Honda Civic Type R 2021 Fitted Edition.


The Crew Motorfest | Year 2 Pass

NEW: Unlock 1 additional vehicle (Cadillac Ciel concept) in the Year 3 Pass (to be purchased separately) if you get the Year 1 or Year 2 Pass!

Learn the ropes of chase and takedown to earn your stripes! Expand your adventure in The Crew Motorfest with new PvE gameplay and a total of 20 additional vehicles.

The Year 2 Pass includes:

- The Chase Squad Experience: Hunt down your targets in a new playlist and new open world challenges. Stop them all and unlock 7 exclusive Chase Squad vehicles: 6 cars and 1 helicopter with unique customization. Flashing lights, underglows, special paint – get the tools to join the guardians of Motorfest.

- 13 additional vehicles available immediately. Get ready to welcome exquisite new rides to your collection, such as the Maserati MC20 Cielo (2023) or the Nissan Skyline GT-R (R32) (1989).


About the Game

Enjoy the game free for five hours!

Grab your ticket to Motorfest, show off your skills, and live the most thrilling driving experiences car culture has to offer!

CELEBRATE ALL THE FACETS OF CAR CULTURE


Discover the playlists and dive into thematic campaigns that will immerse you in the most exciting car culture universes, including American muscle, Japanese-style street racing, and legendary machines of the past!

COLLECT THE MOST LEGENDARY CARS


Master every driving challenge and fill your collection with the most legendary vehicles ever created. Customize your cars and show off your own style with the custom contest mode.

EXPLORE A VIBRANT HAWAIIAN OPEN WORLD


The Crew Motorfest has settled down in one of the most breathtaking places on Earth: the island of O‘ahu, Hawaii. Join high-speed street races through the bustling city of Honolulu, test your off-road skills on the ashy slopes of a volcano, and master the perfect curve on the tracks.

COMPETE IN ADRENALINE-FUELLED LIVE EVENTS


Master all types of vehicles in the Grand Race and finish first among 28 other drivers. Jump into the pure mayhem of Demolition Royale where eight teams battle to be the last one standing. Take on the Summit Clash by completing challenges to dominate the leaderboards!

English*, French*, Italian, German*, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
*languages with full audio support
